description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Beige cheetah printed clucth bag with black trims and a small flap with a magnetic closure A fabric inner with a zipped pocket inside Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 19 cm Width: 28 cm Depth: 6 cm
